Print Sheet: Allies: Your particlar gang within the larger organization of El Hermendad
Strength - (Disarm, Grapple, Knock Down, or Pierce the Heart)
Small time gang leader whose always looked out for the "little guy", you've avoided the Camarilla until now.
You know the status of everyone in your sect. Leadership will tell you how they got one of them. Alternative Idenity can let you earn and fake status. Maxium 5 Fleeting w/o merits.
7/5/3 traits, 3/2/1 backgrounds, 2/1/1 disciplines, 4/3/3/2/2/2/1/1/1/1 abilities, 30pts freebie, 7pts merits max, 7pts flaws max - All Merit/Flaw/Freebies must be on XP Spends Sheet

rows: Small time gang leader whose always looked out for the "little guy", you've avoided the Camarilla until now.

You've seen enough shit in your life to last several. You grew up in the shadow of downtown, in a neighborhood run by El Hermandad. Everyone knew it, hell they were the only order, only jobs, only protection anyone had. Your family came from central Mexico and couldn't speak any English, and El Hermindad was what got them through. Everyone else said they were criminals, but hell, the cops in your neighborhood were the ones raping, murdering and dealing and intimidating the hell out of everyone to keep them silent. Your gang tried to keep the people safe and did what they had to do to survive.

You began running with them when you were 9, by the time you were 14 you were all in. That's how you first ran across Lupo. You didn't know about the vampire thing, yet, not till Lupo let the cat out of the bag in a big way. He knew most of the old timers from "back in the day". They said he was out freeing the people, from what or whom, you didn't know, but you wanted in on that. So, when he came around with strange requests and needing someone to take in people and make it look as if they disappeared, you went for it. You thought maybe he was breaking up some sort of Chinese sex ring or something, but he never discussed it. You just got people out and went about your business...until one day when someone came asking one too many questions. You and your boys had Salamanca's back, but whoever he was turned out too strong for the likes of you. 2 of your friends died that night, and you nearly did too until Lupo showed up and made sure you lived to fight another day.

Now, you know that the person who roughed your shit up was likely an archon of the Camarilla, and that Lupo was a vampire who had been ghouled and was freeing other ghouls from the fate he had been in. That's all admirable and shit, but apparently, just like gangs, vampires see their ghouls as property and don't like their shit messed with. Lupo ended up in hot water and eventually had to flee and hasn't been heard from again. You don't know if he's alive or dead. Last you saw of him, he apologized for making you a blood sucker and told you to keep up the good fight, protecting your neighborhood from the likes of the other vampires out there, because they will not ever give a shit, but that's about all he told you. You've learned everything else you know from keeping your eyes and ears open. You know that there is the "Camarilla" who have their laws, rules, titles and manners and the Anarchs, who supposeldy rule themselves but who tend to do whatever the fuck they want without thought for the consequences. Neither of these ends well for the people on the bottom, as far as you are concerned. Still, you know shit is getting real out there. You've seen it. THere are church people rolling down the street, making life difficult for your gang and for you personally (cause who the hell knew that someone with enough faith could make a vampire feel uncomfortable) and there are a lot of people asking rather pointed questions. It's getting dangerous out there, and you may have to pick a side just for the safety of you and your people - you just hope whichever side you pick doesn't burn your fucking ass off.
Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.
You know that it's getting dangerous and you may have to choose between security and principles. Weigh your options between the Camarilla and the Anarchs and decide what's best for your people.

You know Lupo caused a shitstorm when he skipped town. Word is there is a blood hunt still in effect and there are many who are still pissed at what he stole from them. You need to cover that connection else people may start coming for you to pay up on what he owes.

El Hermendad has long been tied to the Anarchs, but specifically Salvador Garcia, who has been peacing out in his search for God or something. FInd out where he is now and what he wants done with his gang. Perhaps they will now need new guidance.

rows: How much xp am I spending?
If it is an out of clan discipline or a secondary skill who is the teacher?

Action 1 is Alberto getting out a missive of sorts to all the Primogens. The message would be type-written (more out of a "Vampires do this, right?" feeling than any particular inclinations toward typewriters) and the gist would be "Hey we've got Anarchs that aren't affiliated with Tara in our backyard, instead of subjecting them to the Scourge's duties, I figured I'd get all of you to spread out your fingers and figure out how many there are in the city so we can offer them refuge or protection  in exchange for cooperation with the Camarilla". As stated in Discord, he hasnt taken time to figure out where everyone lives, so he will likely distribute them via servants at the Johnathon Club. If this aint necessary as a downtime, I can just do a post in the primogen chat

Going with Garret to meet with Garcia, providing legitimacy from the Court and attempting to convince Garcia of his (Alberto's) plan to sort-of unite the Kyne in the greater LA area against the Inquisition and Technocrats (and eventually against Tara).
Ability - Computer/science/et cetera that this is giving me a downtime.

LEADERSHIP (taking Brian along) re: "base mission" Alberto is offering what "materiel" (read: street guns and hoodlums) he can to the effort to kidnap a high-ranking (possibly) Second Inquisition official from an abandoned military complex in Victorville. He will also come along to provide assistance as necessary in the potential rescue of their anarch captive. Or to help clean the mess if shit absolutely hits the fan.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.

ILLEGAL FAVORS re: Operation Ransom Coverup. Alberto will be lending his forces and knowledge of gang things (I'd make this so much more formal but it's 11:38) to make it seem as though operations like the Hermandad, Bluds, and/or Cripps are performing high-profile kidnappings for ransoms that are meant to fund an upcoming conflict between the outfits. He will be working alongside Caine and his lawpeople to legitimize it.

In the time he isnt swashbuckling or being an appointed official, Alberto will be doing what he can to read up on the history of the kyne as a whole (with an emphasis in LA Kyne politics) so as to better get a grasp of what he's gotten into.
Done - I am not doing any more actions.
